meta.title: GreenPill Podcast Graph Overlay
meta.description: Graph-friendly podcast overlay with series, episodes, guests, curated ecosystem entities, and inferred capital flows.
notes: Episode and series layers are directly derived from the feed catalog.
Guest identities use heuristic extraction from titles and summaries.
Organization and project references use curated keyword matching for better graph quality.

capital_taxonomy.description: Funding, treasury flows, grants, streaming capital, revenue.

capital_taxonomy.label: Reputational
capital_taxonomy.description: Credibility, prestige, visibility, endorsements, trust signals.

capital_taxonomy.label: Governance
capital_taxonomy.description: Roles, credentials, accountability, decision rights, permissions.

capital_taxonomy.label: Coordination
capital_taxonomy.description: Operational alignment across people, chapters, tools, and programs.

capital_taxonomy.label: Cultural
capital_taxonomy.description: Shared story, identity, values, aesthetics, local meaning-making.

capital_taxonomy.label: Ecological
capital_taxonomy.description: Biodiversity, local regeneration, living-system value and stewardship.

capital_taxonomy.label: Operational
capital_taxonomy.description: Execution, logistics, stewardship capacity, day-to-day maintenance.

nodes.label: Localism and Bioregion
nodes.description: Place-based coordination, local economies, land, food, and bioregional thinking.

nodes.label: Network Nations
nodes.description: Digital political communities, network states, and translocal social organization.

nodes.label: Open Source
nodes.description: Open-source software, digital commons, shared tooling, and builder ecosystems.

nodes.label: Public Goods Funding
nodes.description: Grants, retrofunding, capital allocation, and public-goods finance design.

nodes.label: Reputation and Identity
nodes.description: Identity layers, proof systems, attestations, and credibility primitives.

nodes.label: Resilience and Regeneration
nodes.description: Living systems, ecological repair, anti-fragility, and regenerative practice.
